titles.title: For unto Us a Child Is Born

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For unto us a Child is born A Son is given, A Son is given For unto us a Child is born A Son is given, A Son is given The Messiah, Oh to see Him

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To see Him high and lifted up Shining in the light of Your glory Pour out Your power and love As we sing Holy Holy Holy

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To see Him high and lifted up Shining in the light of Your glory Pour out Your power and love As we sing Holy Holy Holy You are high and lifted up Shining in the light of Your glory Lord pour out Your power and love As we sing Holy Holy Holy

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Holy Holy Holy Holy Holy Holy Holy Holy Holy Holy Holy Holy

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: For unto us a Child is born Holy, Holy, Holy, For unto us a Child is born Holy, Holy, Holy, For unto us a Child is born Holy, Holy, Holy, For unto us a Child is born Holy, Holy, Holy.
